description: Single point of failure in primary database cluster
mitigation: Implement multi-AZ RDS with automated failover and read replicas

description: Credential compromise via phishing attacks on employees
mitigation: Deploy phishing-resistant MFA and security awareness training program

description: Key person dependency on infrastructure team lead
mitigation: Cross-training program and documented runbooks for all critical systems

description: GDPR data subject access requests exceeding SLA
mitigation: Automated DSAR workflow with self-service portal

description: Container orchestration failure during peak load
mitigation: Horizontal pod autoscaler with cluster autoscaler and load testing

description: Supply chain attack via compromised open-source dependency
mitigation: Software composition analysis in CI/CD and dependency pinning

description: Cloud cost overrun due to unmonitored resource sprawl
mitigation: FinOps practice with budget alerts and automated resource tagging

description: Disaster recovery plan not tested within 12 months
mitigation: Quarterly DR drills with documented results and improvement actions

description: Insider threat from over-privileged service accounts
mitigation: Implement least privilege with regular access reviews and JIT access

description: Data corruption from concurrent write operations
mitigation: Optimistic locking with conflict detection and automated integrity checks

description: SOC 2 audit finding on change management process gaps
mitigation: Formalized change advisory board and automated change tracking

description: Monitoring blind spots in microservice communication
mitigation: Service mesh with distributed tracing and SLO-based alerting

description: API authentication bypass via token manipulation
mitigation: JWT validation hardening with short-lived tokens and refresh rotation

description: Legacy system integration failures during migration
mitigation: Strangler fig pattern with comprehensive integration test suite

description: Vendor lock-in limiting negotiation leverage for cloud services
mitigation: Multi-cloud abstraction layer and contractual exit clauses

description: Data residency violation from cross-region replication
mitigation: Geo-fencing configuration with automated compliance validation

description: Deployment pipeline failure causing extended release delays
mitigation: Pipeline redundancy with manual deployment runbook as fallback

description: Unencrypted data in transit between internal services
mitigation: Mutual TLS enforcement via service mesh with certificate rotation

description: Memory leak in long-running background processing services
mitigation: Memory profiling in staging and automated pod restart on threshold

description: Third-party vendor failing to meet SLA commitments
mitigation: Vendor performance monitoring with contractual penalty clauses
